name: AuditVotes: Elevating Provable Defense for GNNs with Efficient Augmentation and Conditional Smoothing
summary: arXiv:2503.22998v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Despite advancements in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), adaptive attacks continue to challenge their robustness. Certified robustness via ran...
description: arXiv:2503.22998v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Despite advancements in Graph Neural Networks (GNNs), adaptive attacks continue to challenge their robustness. Certified robustness via randomized smoothing offers provable guarantees but suffers from a severe accuracy-robustness trade-off, limiting its practical use. To bridge this gap, we introduce AuditVotes, the first framework that...
author: Yuni Lai, Yulin Zhu, Yixuan Sun, Yulun Wu, Bin Xiao, Gaolei Li, Jianhua Li, Qi Xie, Kai Zhou
